hero.headline: Put your products on the right shelf
hero.subheadline: Supermarkets list their shelf space in 3D. Brands discover and book premium eye-level positions at transparent prices — no calls, no emails.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From empty shelf to sold-out product
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. Zero phone calls.

steps.title: Supermarkets map their halls
steps.description: Use our 3D hall editor to recreate your store layout. Define shelf sections with exact dimensions, positions, and tier-based daily pricing.

steps.title: Available shelves go live
steps.description: Green-highlighted shelves signal real-time availability. The moment a booking is confirmed, the shelf instantly turns red across all views.

steps.title: Brands discover & book
steps.description: Product owners filter by tier, price, and location, explore the 3D layout, then book a date range instantly — no back-and-forth needed.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Built for both sides of the shelf marketplace.

items.title: 3D hall editor
items.description: Drag-and-drop shelf placement in an interactive Three.js scene. Rotate, zoom, and click any shelf to manage it.

items.title: Tier-based pricing
items.description: Eye-level shelves command premium rates. Set price per day per shelf.

items.title: Date-range bookings
items.description: Overlap detection prevents double bookings automatically.

items.title: Google & email auth
items.description: Sign up with Google or email. Separate roles for each user type.

items.title: Real-time availability
items.description: Shelf status updates the moment a booking lands.

items.title: Booking history
items.description: Full audit trail for supermarkets and brands.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Shelf pricing by tier
pricing.subtitle: Each supermarket sets their own daily rate. These are typical starting prices across our network.
pricing.note: Prices set by individual supermarkets · Final rates may vary

tiers.description: Floor level. Budget-friendly, great for large or heavy items.
Mid-height. Balanced visibility and price for growing brands.
Premium placement. Proven to drive the highest conversion rates.
Above eye-level. Great for tall, aspirational or premium products.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Loved by supermarkets and brands
testimonials.subtitle: Join hundreds of businesses already using Shelf to grow.

items.quote: We listed our shelves in under an hour. The 3D editor made it easy — brands can actually visualize the space before booking.

items.title: Store Manager, FreshMart

items.quote: Eye-level bookings tripled our sales for that product line within the first month. The pricing transparency is a game changer.

items.title: Brand Director, NutriCo

items.quote: No more emailing back and forth with 12 store managers. I find the shelf, pick the dates, done. Shelf pays for itself in one campaign.

items.title: Marketing Lead, SnackHouse

items.quote: The booking system just works. Our revenue from shelf rentals went up 40% after switching from manual spreadsheets.

items.title: Operations Director, GreenGrocer

items.quote: Finally a platform that thinks about supermarkets AND brands equally. The dashboard gives us everything we need.

items.title: Category Manager, SpiceRoute

items.quote: We onboarded 3 new supermarket partners in a week. The 3D shelf view convinced them immediately — no long sales calls.
